font_stack.summary: Google Fonts loads Bricolage Grotesque, Geist, and Geist Mono; current tokens route display/body/outlier through Geist and Geist Mono variables.

palette.summary: OKLCH custom properties live in the root tokens.css file and are imported by frontend/src/styles.css.

motion.summary: motion-cut; no framer-motion, gsap, motion, lenis, lottie-react, react-spring, or auto-animate dependency detected.

spacing.summary: 4-point semantic spacing scale is defined in tokens.css and consumed throughout frontend/src/styles.css.

framework.summary: React 19 with Vite 6, Vite root set to frontend/src.

icons.summary: lucide-react is installed and used consistently for navigation, actions, and observer state.

introduce: view registry and grouped work model
